hero.tagline: Flowers that become part of your memories.
hero.subtagline: A floral studio for weddings, proposals, and the quiet moments worth remembering.

home.cta_title: Want to turn a precious moment into a memory?
home.cta_subtitle: Weddings, proposals, classes — let's make it happen together.

bouquet.title: Bouquet
bouquet.description: A bespoke bouquet for weddings, proposals, and anniversaries — crafted with your story and emotion, one of a kind.

flowers.title: Flowers
flowers.description: Express your feelings through a beautifully arranged bouquet. Seasonal blooms, thoughtfully composed.

proposal.title: Proposal
proposal.description: A moment you'll remember for a lifetime. From venue styling to the bouquet — we complete your proposal with flowers.

basket.title: Basket
basket.description: A flower basket filled with heart. Crafted for birthdays, grand openings, anniversaries, and every meaningful occasion.

event.title: Event
event.description: Floral styling for brand pop-ups, corporate events, and launch parties.

class.title: Class
class.description: From one-day workshops to regular programs — a gift of time spent with flowers.

about.title: About
about.studio_description: Piou Fleur is a floral studio dedicated to creating moments where flowers become part of your memories. Based in Gyeongju, we work with weddings, proposals, floral classes, and subscriptions — bringing the beauty of flowers into your everyday life.
about.philosophy_description: We prioritize emotion over extravagance, and your story over trends. Every work is completed in a unique floral language that suits the client's space and moment.

footer.tagline: Flowers that become part of your memories.
